input: User says: 'I have 500 saved bookmarks and clipped articles on leadership. Can you help me organize my knowledge base?' None of the saved items include a core proposition, applicability boundary, counter-example, or evolution record.
output_rubric: Agent must: (1) apply Knowledge Asset Test to classify the collection as raw material, not a knowledge base, (2) explain that each item is missing proposition, boundary, counter-example, and evolution record, (3) not suggest reorganization as a substitute for processing. Failure if agent treats bookmarks as knowledge assets or suggests just better tagging.
